_doc: API server configuration. Phase 1: core runtime (database, auth, telegram, CORS).

database._doc: Primary database. Used by graph_nodes, graph_edges, specs, ideas, etc.
database._url_doc: SQLite for dev, PostgreSQL for production: postgresql://user:pass@host/db

database_overrides._doc: Per-service database URLs. null = use database.url as fallback.
database_overrides._doc2: Set these only if a service needs its own database (e.g., separate PostgreSQL instance).

auth._warning: Change these in production. dev-key is rejected when COHERENCE_ENV=production.

cors._doc: Allowed CORS origins for web frontend.

telegram._doc: Telegram bot for alerts on failed/needs_decision tasks.

storage._doc: File paths for local storage (dev mode). Production uses database.url.
storage._doc2: null = use database. Set paths only for file-based dev mode.

server._environment_doc: development or production. Production enforces real API keys.

agent_executor._doc: How tasks are executed by the API-side executor (not the local runner).
agent_executor._doc2: default=federation means tasks go to node runners, not API-side execution.

agent_providers._doc: Provider-specific API config for the executor.
